name: yeeflow-builder
description: Private Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills, including Advanced Controls learning, runtime proof, and tenant-neutral environment configuration guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Private Yeeflow application-building skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Private Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying schema-backed YAPK Resource decode guidance, preserving signing/resource proof boundaries, generating forms, lists, dashboards, advanced controls, Pivot Table analytics controls, Collection/Kanban actions, Kanban/Collection/Timeline Dynamic controls, Dynamic Sub List and Print Page patterns, expressions, workflows, document-library patterns, and custom code controls, orchestrating runtime tests, validating package materialization, generated data-list seed/add-readiness, action target readiness, approval request-page publish readiness, safely checking read-only Yeeflow directory API connectivity from local environment variables, and managing private plugin releases.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Yeeflow app from these requirements.
Validate this Yeeflow package before runtime testing.
Plan a Yeeflow runtime test pass.
Generate Collection/Kanban item actions with selection and bulk operations.
Run the safe Yeeflow directory API connectivity smoke test.
Update the Yeeflow Builder Plugin release.
What Collection and Kanban actions support is included in v0.5.27?
How does v0.6.1 handle Yeeflow tenant URLs and .env.local configuration?
